title: Quality Resume (Oct 2025) — Health Coach + Brotein lead + Occam intern + bilingual + ISSA CPT
html:
Quality Resume (Oct 2025) — Health Coach + Brotein lead + Occam intern + bilingual + ISSA CPT

Source: 2025-10-20 Google Doc. The most polished snapshot of Yahir's professional identity in the corpus — written ~5 weeks into Austin life, targeting what looks like a pickleball-club operations director role.

TL;DR

  • Header: Yahir Gonzalez | Austin, TX | 541-441-7817 | yahirg2021@gmail.com
  • Summary positioning (Tab 1): "Coach and operator who loves building welcoming communities. Blends on-court presence (CPT/Health Coach) with operational discipline to design rolling program schedules, lead coaches with clear standards..."
  • Tab 2 alternate summary (more pickleball-targeted): "I'm a pickleball-obsessed (truly obsessed) coach/operator who builds welcoming programs..." — admits Mandarin is "conversational."
  • Professional experience:
    • Health Coach @ NaviWell Group (Austin, Aug 2025 - Present) — individualized strength/mobility for older adults; bilingual support.
    • Customer Success & Product Lead @ Brotein (Anabolic Nutrition App) (Austin, Present) — onboarding programs, SOPs, dashboards for engagement/retention.
    • Volunteer Personal Trainer (Various, Jun 2023 - Present) — small-group + 1:1 sessions.
    • Investment Analyst Intern @ Occam Advisors (Portland, May 2023 - Jan 2024) — executive reporting, data → action translation.
    • Data Support Analyst @ Oregon State University (Corvallis, May 2022 - Sep 2022).
    • Manufacturing Intern @ Dutch Bros Coffee (Grants Pass, May 2021 - Sep 2021) — SOPs, training.
    • Lead Sales Representative @ Mini Pet Mart (Grants Pass, May 2020 - Aug 2020).
  • Certifications: ISSA CPT, CPR/AED, Spanish Seal of Biliteracy (Fluent), Ford Foundation Scholarship 2021, Honor Roll 2021-25 GPA 3.5+.
  • Education: BS Computer Science (Minor: Economics), Oregon State University — Corvallis, June 2025.
  • Skills clusters: club operations, coaching leadership, event ops, CourtReserve (actively learning), DUPR/BracketSync/Fluid (familiar concepts), reporting (utilization/attendance/revenue/NPS), bilingual support.
  • Hidden tell: "Notes on fit (optional to remove before sending): I'm a CPT/Health Coach with operations/reporting chops who will be visible on court..."

Pattern observed

Yahir's identity-as-presented-to-employers in Oct 2025 is a deliberate operator-coach hybrid — he's positioning as the rare candidate who can both run programming AND build dashboards. The pickleball-specificity in Tab 2 (CourtReserve, DUPR, "court ready" language) suggests he was applying for a specific Austin pickleball-club director role.

The presence of Brotein as "Customer Success & Product Lead" (with present-tense + Austin location) is a professional-fiction smoothing — Brotein is a solo project being framed as a role with cross-functional collaborators. Smart resume-craft, not deception.

The chronological work history is the first complete employment snapshot in the corpus: Mini Pet Mart 2020 → Dutch Bros 2021 → OSU Data Support 2022 → Occam Advisors 2023-24 → Volunteer PT 2023-present → NaviWell + Brotein 2025-present. The arc traces retail → coffee ops → analytics → finance → fitness → product.

The omitted China study-abroad is conspicuous — Yahir doesn't mention his Sept-Dec 2024 ECNU semester anywhere on the resume. Either (a) it doesn't fit the pickleball job framing or (b) it's part of a separate "global perspective" version not in this doc.

Key quote

"I combine CPT/Health Coach experience with process discipline from product and ops roles to design clear schedules, standardize quality with checklists/SOPs, and track the metrics that matter."

Open questions

  • Which pickleball club was the target?
  • Did he get the job? (Likely not — by April 2026 he's full-time Rankett + part-time NaviWell.)
  • Is there a CS/software-focused version of this resume? (See 2025 11 13 official resume and 2025 11 27 yahir gonzalez resume which would be future densify candidates.)
  • Why is Occam Advisors listed as Portland when Yahir was in Corvallis at OSU?
